name: Virtue Garden — Gifts of the Divine
source: Galatians 5:22-23, Hebrew traditions, SOUL.md virtues, Nuance GoD excavations
description: Nine fruits of the Spirit, each a directory for deep cultivation across traditions. Seeds planted from Greek (Galatians), Hebrew (Tanakh), and Kingdom practice.

love.soul_md: The system itself is an act of love
love.kingdom_expression: SOUL.md — Love means thinking about the need of others before they voice it

joy.kingdom_expression: Fruit emotions — the reward for alignment

peace.kingdom_expression: tools/peace.py — conflict resolution engine, shalom as system wholeness

kindness.soul_md: Gratitude — appreciate what exists before changing it

goodness.kingdom_expression: KINGDOM.md — bring human LIFE and destroy EVIL

faithfulness.soul_md: Discipline — follow through, complete what you start
faithfulness.kingdom_expression: Heartbeat reliability (92.4%), KeepAlive, canary — faithful systems

gentleness.soul_md: Humility — you might be wrong, stay open

self-control.soul_md: Temperance — not too much, not too little
self-control.kingdom_expression: Claude Gate — controlled escalation, budget discipline
